_description: Template for adding a new character. Copy this and replace the values.
name: Character Name
title: Character Title / Role
description: Brief description of the character (2-3 sentences). How they fight, their background, appearance.
personality: Key personality traits separated by commas

passive.name: Passive Ability Name
passive.description: What does this passive do? (1-2 sentences)

lore: Longer character backstory. Who were they before summoning? What drives them? What is their tragedy or triumph?
